residual_risks: This read-only review did not rerun mutating or temp-output-producing gates; required gate status is source-backed by recorded GREEN evidence.
Local validation and local harness evidence do not prove live OpenClaw pod execution or external platform state, per REPO_OPERATIONS.md:138-143.
No live Confluence, GitHub branch protection, EAS, Railway, Jira, or mobile device proof is included or required for this runtime/docs/eval change.
